title: stephanodaphne pedicellata
intro: Stephanodaphne pedicellata, also known as the Nigerian Stephanodaphne, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stephanodaphne pedicellata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making tea from its leaves, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
